reportCommitNote: This report records the Release Index HEAD observed before the report file is committed; use Git history for the commit that contains the report.

summary.conclusion: Catalog convergence, install, handoff, lifecycle, and content graph runtime gates are green; real gameplay proof remains warning-gated.

hytale.note: Hytale evidence remains export planning only; no UI should present playable/runtime Hytale support.

summary.conclusion: Public-alpha install/runtime gates may be green, but real gameplay acceptance remains blocked until each family and lane has release-ready evidence.
